name: IT Incident Postmortem
description: For reviewing an IT incident or outage: what happened, why, and how to prevent recurrence.

sections.title: Incident Summary
sections.instruction: State the incident date/time, affected systems, severity, and total duration/impact as discussed.

sections.title: Timeline of Events
sections.instruction: Reconstruct the sequence of events in chronological order with timestamps, as described in the discussion.

sections.title: Root Cause
sections.instruction: Describe the root cause(s) identified. Distinguish confirmed root cause from suspected/unconfirmed causes.

sections.title: Impact
sections.instruction: Summarize who/what was affected - systems, clients, users - and for how long.

sections.title: Remediation Actions Taken
sections.instruction: List the steps taken to resolve the incident during the response.

sections.title: Follow-up Action Items
sections.instruction: List preventive or follow-up actions to reduce recurrence risk, with an owner and due date.

sections.title: Lessons Learned
sections.instruction: Summarize what the team learned and what should change going forward.
